news.headline: Candidate calls for new election in Peru, claiming fraud without evidence
news.summary: Peru’s presidential candidate Rafael Lopez Aliaga is urging officials to declare Sunday’s election 'null and void’.

news.headline: Mossad says Israel will keep trying to topple Iran’s government
news.summary:
Israel’s spy chief has pledged more covert efforts to try to topple Iran’s government, a tacit acknowledgment the countries’ conflict would continue even as the US pursued a new round of peace negotiations with the Islamic Republic.

news.headline: US military says blockade of Iran ports ‘completely’ halts economic trade
news.summary: US Central Command say more than 10,000 armed forces members, as well as warships and planes, are involved in blockade.

news.headline: Champions League: PSG through to semis after defeating Liverpool
news.summary: Paris Saint-Germain beat Liverpool (2-0) thanks to a brace from Ousmane Dembélé and have reached the Champions League semi-finals for the third year running.
